response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics and on-screen lyrics closely matched the custom song 'VAVAVA! Virtual Oita'.
2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was used as a base, but since it was truncated, manual transcription was conducted for the full duration of the video. Dialect words of Oita were accurately transcribed and translated.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were tightly timed to the audio vocalizations. On-screen text events (the MV announcement and the hand-written end card) were subtitled during silent sections to preserve visual context.

subtitles.original: 高崎山に金鱗湖
subtitles.english: Takasakiyama and Lake Kinrin

subtitles.original: 青の洞門 由布川渓谷
subtitles.english: Ao no Doumon and Yufugawa Canyon

subtitles.original: 進め 稲積水中鍾乳洞
subtitles.english: Forward to the Inazumi Underwater Cave!

subtitles.original: 果てしなき旅 努力 演奏
subtitles.english: An endless journey, effort, and performance!

subtitles.original: たどり着く先 食べる 弁当
subtitles.english: Our destination, where we'll eat bento!

subtitles.original: 時空を超えた奇跡の 大地
subtitles.english: A miraculous land transcending space and time...

subtitles.original: バーチャル大分 いくぞー！
subtitles.english: Virtual Oita! Here we go!

subtitles.original: バーチャル大分 世に放つ
subtitles.english: Virtual Oita, released to the world!

subtitles.original: バーチャル大分 湯を沸かす
subtitles.english: Virtual Oita, heating up the hot springs!

subtitles.original: 君と バーチャル大分 駆け巡る
subtitles.english: Running around Virtual Oita with you!

subtitles.original: バーチャル大分 大分 どーん！
subtitles.english: Virtual Oita, Oita, boom!

subtitles.english: Virtual Oita, released to the world!

subtitles.english: Oita, boom!

subtitles.original: よだきい しゃあしい えーらしい
subtitles.english: Tiresome, noisy, so cute!

subtitles.original: しんけん やおねえ ふうがわりい
subtitles.english: Very tough, eccentric!

subtitles.original: なしか むげねえ せせろしい
subtitles.english: Why? Pitiful, restless!

subtitles.original: だけどあんた 今なにしちょん？
subtitles.english: But what are you doing right now?

subtitles.original: 説明しよう！ バーチャル大分観光大使とは
subtitles.english: Let me explain! The Virtual Oita Tourism Ambassadors...

subtitles.original: バーチャル大分への深い郷土愛を持ち
subtitles.english: ...possess a deep love for the homeland of Virtual Oita...

subtitles.original: その魅力を余すところなく伝え続ける存在
subtitles.english: ...and continue to convey its charms to the fullest!

subtitles.original: 人はその大使の名を バーチャル大分観光大使と呼ぶ！
subtitles.english: People call these ambassadors, "Virtual Oita Tourism Ambassadors"!

subtitles.original: バーチャル O-O-I-T-A I wanna be
subtitles.english: Virtual O-O-I-T-A, I wanna be

subtitles.original: のっちょる？ だんちょー 観光大使！
subtitles.english: Are you on board? Captain, Tourism Ambassador!

subtitles.original: 新曲MV公開、この後すぐ！
subtitles.english: [On-Screen: New MV release, right after this!]

subtitles.original: 団員さん！今年も お誕生日をお祝いしてくれて本当にありがとう〜♥\n新衣装や表情など…どうだったかな？？！
subtitles.english: Order members! Thank you so much for celebrating my birthday again this year! ♥\nHow did you like my new outfit and expressions?!

subtitles.original: 少しでも好き〜〜ってなってくれたらとっても嬉しいです。来年も一緒に時間を過ごせますように…☆ 大好きだよ〜♪\nNoe 2025.11.24
subtitles.english: I'd be so happy if you liked them even a little! I hope we can spend time together next year too... ☆\nLove you all! ♪ - Noe 2025.11.24
